sprint.name: Forge Expansion Sprint
sprint.note: A scheduled review is not a guaranteed release. The forge publishes at most one coherent change when it clears the quality and safety gates; otherwise it skips the window.
sprint.secondaryAutomation: A separate GitHub Actions workflow runs Tuesday and Friday at 15:17 UTC. It can only create or improve approved declarative-engine apps and records accepted publishes in this ledger.

method.label: Inspect
method.description: Review the live site, repository, current apps, open feedback, bugs, depth, accessibility, and portfolio gaps.

method.label: Compare
method.description: Consider at least three candidate changes and choose the one that creates the strongest useful depth or breadth.

method.label: Build one
method.description: Create or improve one coherent feature or app, including mobile, keyboard, touch, reduced-motion, teardown, and edge cases.

method.label: Validate
method.description: Run JavaScript syntax checks, feedback-routing tests, registry rules, required-file checks, and safety-boundary validation.

method.label: Publish or skip
method.description: Merge and deploy only after every required check passes. Skip when the candidate is weak, unsafe, duplicative, or incomplete.

qualityGates: One coherent change maximum per review window
No secrets, trackers, accounts, hidden storage, or unreviewed network behavior
No direct execution of user feedback
Mobile, keyboard, touch, focus, and reduced-motion behavior considered
Repository validation must pass before main is published

queue.title: Fabline Control process-window balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on knob differentiation, hidden-drift readability, inspection value, contamination and maintenance pressure, wafer scarcity, yield targets, narrow-screen steppers, keyboard operation, unlock pacing, and engineer recovery consequences.

queue.title: Relevance Lab ranking-strategy balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on signal differentiation, ranking readability, experiment-budget pressure, diversity and freshness tradeoffs, commercial-bias penalties, narrow-screen steppers, keyboard operation, unlock pacing, and rollback consequences.

queue.title: Collection Navigator stability regression playtest
queue.reason: Verify late-loading cards trigger one bounded refresh, sorting no longer self-schedules renders, shortlist and recent controls remain stable after reordering, keyboard shortcuts do not leak after teardown, and visible counts stay accurate.

queue.title: Folding Frontier 1.1 regression playtest
queue.reason: Verify numbered bond controls, collision rings, readiness messaging, hint highlighting, canvas selection, narrow-screen layout, keyboard rotation, target fairness, mentor recovery, and teardown across all six proteins.

queue.title: Privacy Ledger 1.1 strategy regression playtest
queue.reason: Verify scenario-specific control bonuses, control tradeoff explanations, audited and unaudited risk displays, readiness gates, budget composition, equity thresholds, disabled actions, narrow-screen controls, keyboard operation, counsel consequences, unlock pacing, and teardown across all six releases.

recentDecisions.title: Privacy Ledger 1.1.0
recentDecisions.summary: Compared a Privacy Ledger playability pass, a crisis-negotiation simulator, and a Fabline Control balance pass. Prioritized the queued privacy-strategy evidence gap because the four controls lacked distinct situational roles and players could not clearly read audit uncertainty, cumulative budget cost, or release readiness. The release adds scenario-specific protection bonuses, explicit control tradeoffs, audited risk ranges, four visible readiness gates, projected budget spend, clearer counsel consequences, improved disabled states, and preserved local-only teardown.
checks: No storage, permissions, secrets, or network additions

recentDecisions.title: Folding Frontier 1.1.0
recentDecisions.summary: Compared a Folding Frontier playability pass, a crisis-negotiation simulator, and a museum-routing puzzle. Prioritized the existing spatial puzzle because the public queue identified bond-selection clarity, collision feedback, touch precision, and target readability as the highest-value evidence gap. The release adds numbered bond controls, per-level strategy guidance, visible collision rings, live submit-readiness messaging, clearer hint highlighting, improved narrow-screen controls, and preserved local-only teardown.
checks: No storage, permissions, secrets, or network additions

recentDecisions.title: Collection Navigator 1.1.1
recentDecisions.summary: Compared a Navigator stability repair, a crisis-negotiation simulator, and a Folding Frontier balance pass. Prioritized the repair after finding that Navigator card reordering could retrigger its own mutation observer and schedule continuous animation-frame work. The release limits observation to genuinely added app cards, avoids no-op DOM reordering, refreshes bound card data safely, and tears down observers, global listeners, frames, and timers.
checks: No storage, permissions, secrets, or network additions

recentDecisions.title: Collection Navigator 1.1.0
recentDecisions.summary: Compared a deeper collection-discovery workspace, a crisis-negotiation simulator, and a museum-exhibit routing puzzle. Prioritized the navigator because the gallery now contains well over one hundred experiences and discovery quality creates more portfolio value than another adjacent six-stage simulator. The release adds mechanic-based discovery missions, multi-term relevance ranking, a three-app compare shortlist, recently-opened-aware surprise selection, keyboard shortcuts, responsive compare controls, and local session-only state.
checks: No storage, permissions, secrets, or network additions

recentDecisions.title: Folding Frontier 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Six protein chains, rotatable bonds, contacts, collisions, move limits, hints, undo, progression, failure, recovery, and a session unlock added a spatial science puzzle.

recentDecisions.title: Privacy Ledger 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Six dataset releases, adjustable protection controls, cumulative privacy budget, attack pressure, audits, utility and equity tradeoffs, progression, failure, recovery, and a session unlock added a privacy-strategy loop.

recentDecisions.title: Fabline Control 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Six production lots, hidden tool drift, process controls, scarcity, contamination, maintenance, yield, progression, failure, recovery, and a session unlock added an industrial-control loop.

recentDecisions.title: Relevance Lab 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Six query sets, weighted ranking signals, limited experiments, relevance and diversity tradeoffs, progression, failure, recovery, and a session unlock added an information-retrieval strategy loop.

recentDecisions.title: Acoustic Commons 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Six venues, layered synthesis, shifting audience needs, energy, fatigue, optional audio, progression, failure, recovery, and a session unlock added an audio-first strategy loop.

recentDecisions.title: Civic Ledger 1.0.0

recentDecisions.title: Conservator's Bench 1.0.0

recentDecisions.title: Argument Architect 1.0.0

recentDecisions.title: Trackline Ranger 1.0.0

recentDecisions.title: Collection Navigator 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Search, ordering, visible counts, session history, and surprise selection improved discovery across the growing gallery.

recentDecisions.title: Harbor Pilot 1.1.0
recentDecisions.summary: Continuous vessel motion, drift, traffic, fuel, hull, progression, failure, recovery, and a session unlock added a real-time navigation loop.
